issues.message: Form control is missing an accessible label

evidence.reason: Form control has no accessible label.

issues.suggested_fix: Add a visible <label> connected with for/id. Use aria-label only when a visible label is not possible.

rule.title: Form control missing accessible label
rule.why_it_matters: Students using keyboard navigation, assistive technology, or simplified layouts may not know what information the field expects.
rule.manual_review_notes: Check whether the visual design already implies the label but fails programmatically.
rule.static_check_limitations: Static HTML cannot always confirm labels created dynamically by JavaScript.

issues.message: Image is missing useful alt text

evidence.reason: Image is missing useful alt text.

issues.suggested_fix: Add alt text that describes the image purpose, or mark decorative images as presentation.

rule.title: Image missing useful alt text
rule.why_it_matters: Students using screen readers miss the image content entirely, which can hide instructions, diagrams, or required information.
rule.manual_review_notes: Confirm whether the image is informative or decorative; only a human can judge if existing alt text is actually useful.
rule.static_check_limitations: Static checks cannot judge alt text quality, only whether it exists.

issues.message: Focused control has no accessible name

evidence.reason: A keyboard user reached this control, but it has no label, text, aria-label, or other usable name.

issues.suggested_fix: Add a visible label, text content, or aria-label so students know what the control does.

rule.title: Focused control has no accessible name
rule.why_it_matters: A keyboard user can reach the control, but without a name a screen reader announces nothing useful about what it does.
rule.manual_review_notes: The accessible name is estimated; confirm with browser dev tools or a screen reader what is actually announced.
rule.browser_check_limitations: Accessible names are estimated from labels, text, and common attributes, not from a full accessibility tree computation.

issues.message: Form control is missing an accessible label

evidence.snippet: <input type="image" src="/media/template/search.svg" alt="Submit Search" class="" style="">
evidence.reason: Form control has no accessible label.

issues.suggested_fix: Add a visible <label> connected with for/id. Use aria-label only when a visible label is not possible.

rule.title: Form control missing accessible label
rule.why_it_matters: Students using keyboard navigation, assistive technology, or simplified layouts may not know what information the field expects.
rule.manual_review_notes: Check whether the visual design already implies the label but fails programmatically.
rule.static_check_limitations: Static HTML cannot always confirm labels created dynamically by JavaScript.

issues.message: Fixed or wide content may prevent reflow

evidence.text: skip to main content Main Navigation services articles resources projects commun
evidence.reason: A rendered element is wider than the narrow viewport or uses a large fixed pixel width.

issues.suggested_fix: Replace fixed-width layout with responsive sizing such as max-width: 100%.

rule.title: Fixed or wide content may prevent reflow
rule.why_it_matters: Large fixed-width elements can force horizontal scrolling and hide content when users zoom or use narrow windows.
rule.manual_review_notes: Confirm whether the wide element is essential and whether all content remains reachable without two-dimensional scrolling.
rule.browser_check_limitations: The check flags obvious wide rendered elements and fixed pixel widths; it may miss complex layout problems.

issues.message: Fixed or wide content may prevent reflow

issues.message: Focused element may not show a visible focus indicator

evidence.reason: The focused element did not expose an obvious outline, box-shadow, or border focus style in computed CSS.

issues.suggested_fix: Provide a clear :focus or :focus-visible style with visible outline, border, or shadow.

rule.title: Focused element may not show a visible focus indicator
rule.why_it_matters: Keyboard users with low vision need a visible indicator to know which control currently has focus.
rule.manual_review_notes: Manually tab through the page; some custom focus styles may be visible but not detected by this heuristic.
rule.browser_check_limitations: Focus indicator detection checks computed outline, border, and shadow heuristically and can miss custom visual treatments.

issues.suggested_fix: Provide a clear :focus or :focus-visible style with visible outline, border, or shadow.

rule.title: Focused element may not show a visible focus indicator
rule.why_it_matters: Keyboard users with low vision need a visible indicator to know which control currently has focus.
rule.manual_review_notes: Manually tab through the page; some custom focus styles may be visible but not detected by this heuristic.
rule.browser_check_limitations: Focus indicator detection checks computed outline, border, and shadow heuristically and can miss custom visual treatments.

limitations: This prototype runs static HTML checks plus a basic keyboard interaction audit.
It does not replace a full human accessibility audit.
Browser mode does not simulate a full screen reader, and accessible names are estimated.
Low-vision browser checks are conservative heuristics and require manual review.

limitations: Low-vision checks use browser-computed styles and conservative heuristics.
Rendered color contrast checks do not prove full WCAG conformance.
Zoom/reflow uses a narrow viewport approximation rather than a full zoom compliance test.
Focus indicator detection may miss custom focus styles.

ai_scout.summary: Possible accessibility barriers found on the WebAIM contact page

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some images may not have useful alternative text
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users who rely on screen readers or have visual impairments may not be able to understand the content of these images
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: Multiple instances of missing image alt text were detected

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some form controls may be missing accessible labels
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users who rely on screen readers or have visual impairments may not be able to understand the purpose of these form controls
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: Instances of missing form labels were detected

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some focused controls may be missing accessible names
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users who rely on screen readers or have visual impairments may not be able to understand the purpose of these controls
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: Instances of browser focused control missing name were detected

outreach_notes: We suggest reviewing the contact page for potential accessibility barriers, particularly with regards to image alternative text, form control labels, and focused control names.
limitations: AI Scout findings are suggestions and need human review.
AI Scout output is not a confirmed accessibility finding.
AI Scout does not determine legal compliance, WCAG compliance, or screen-reader behavior.
AI Scout output is not a needs human review accessibility finding.
